title: Supply Chain Analyst
description: Under Armour seeks a Supply Chain Analyst to optimize procurement and supply chain operations supporting global growth.
responsibilities: Analyze supply chain metrics and identify optimization opportunities
Develop supplier relationships and manage negotiations
Forecast demand and optimize inventory management
Create supply chain reports and dashboards
Support cost reduction initiatives and process improvements
Collaborate with operations and product teams

requirements.education: High school diploma or equivalent; relevant degree or certification strongly preferred

benefits: Flexible time off and work arrangements
